# Core Data Structures (compat shim)


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

``` python
# Shim verification: the re-export is class-identical AND the wire
# registration travels with it (fused-era plugins importing from here
# return DTOs that cross the worker boundary typed).
import json as _json
import cjm_transcription_adapter_interface.core as _new
from cjm_plugin_system.core.wire import wire_encode, wire_decode, WIRE_KIND_KEY

assert TranscriptionResult is _new.TranscriptionResult
res = TranscriptionResult(text='shim round-trip')
env = wire_encode(res)
assert env[WIRE_KIND_KEY] == 'transcription.result'
back = wire_decode(_json.loads(_json.dumps(env)))
assert isinstance(back, TranscriptionResult) and back == res
print('core shim OK')
```

    core shim OK
